title: ThemeConfig
description: Chativa widget theme — visual + behavioural flags. Pass any subset (deep partial) to chatStore.getState().setTheme(); only the fields you provide are overridden. Source of truth: packages/core/src/domain/value-objects/Theme.ts (ThemeConfig + DEFAULT_THEME).

colors.description: Brand color palette. All values are CSS color strings (hex, rgb, hsl, etc.).

primary.description: Launcher button, user message bubbles, header gradient start, focus rings.

position.description: Corner of the screen where the launcher button appears.

horizontalSpace.description: Horizontal gap between the panel edge and the viewport edge.

verticalSpace.description: Vertical gap between the panel and the launcher button.

avatar.description: Avatar configuration for bot, user, and header.

bot.description: Bot avatar URL. Omit for default robot SVG.

user.description: User avatar URL. Omit for default person SVG.

header.description: Header avatar URL. Omit for default robot SVG.

showBot.description: Render the bot avatar next to bot messages.

showUser.description: Render the user avatar next to user messages.

allowFullscreen.description: Show the fullscreen toggle button in the chat header.

showMessageStatus.description: Show delivery/read status ticks on user messages.

enableSearch.description: Show the search toggle in the chat header.

enableMultiConversation.description: Enable conversation list view inside the popup. Requires connector.listConversations / switchConversation.

enableFileUpload.description: Show the file upload button in the chat input (still requires connector.sendFile).

hideButtonOnOpen.description: Hide the launcher button while the chat window is open. Only applies when slotted custom content is used.

windowMode.description: How the chat window is presented. popup = floating card, side-panel = full-height drawer, fullscreen = covers viewport, inline = static within parent container.

endOfConversationSurvey.description: End-of-conversation survey configuration. The connector must implement sendSurvey for submissions to be delivered.

mode.description: inline = appended to message list as a bot card; screen = full overlay.

trigger.description: onClose = intercept close button; manual = only on host-dispatched show-survey event.

requireCommentBelow.description: Require a comment when the rating is at or below this value. Set 0 to never require.

kind.description: Opaque identifier forwarded to the connector as SurveyPayload.kind.

resetOnSubmit.description: Tear down the engine + connector after submit/skip so the next open starts fresh.
